product.name: Beast AI / BeastBrain
product.description: AI-powered content creation agent for creating, improving, and managing digital content.

payment_use_case.primary: Small card payments for AI credits and subscriptions

document_status.blocker: Investment entity license, MOA/articles, and partners list for DED-1324297 were not found by filename search in the current workspace.

compliance_notes: Merchant KYB is required for card acquiring even when customer payments are small.
Do not use SICHER MAYOR COMMERCIAL BROKERS L.L.C DED 841208 documents as primary proof for this profile unless the provider accepts related-entity evidence.
BeastBrain must not store raw card numbers, expiry dates, or CVV.
